option.value: processed|how many parcels have been processed
clearly|handle dummy parcel cases (where clearly there are no parcel references available, and we created dummy parcel for them)
dummy|handle dummy parcel cases (where clearly there are no parcel references available, and we created dummy parcel for them)
7S|normally we would use warehouse legal name as first name and last name, but 7S need some specific carrier HUB names which we define as warehouse contact person
